scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/agent
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/backend && npm run lint -w apps/agent && npm run lint -w apps/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/agent && npm run test -w apps/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/backend && npm run typecheck -w apps/agent && npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend
